query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a tan and white dog with long, droopy ears resting its head on a brown wooden surface. The dog has a prominent pink and brown nose with visible nostrils, relaxed eyes, and white markings around its muzzle and between its eyes.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up portrait of a tan and white dog with long, droopy ears resting its head on a brown wooden surface, showing a prominent pink and brown nose and relaxed eyes, the entire image covered in dense heavy grain, noise, and textured surface artifacts that lend an organic, tactile, analog film quality to the dog's fur and the wooden surface.
